campbell.title: Campbell City Council — May 5, 2026
campbell.summary: The Campbell City Council met to review transportation funding investments, adopt a new policy limiting use of city property for federal civil enforcement activities, and discuss open positions and strategies to recruit and retain city employees.
keyTopics: Santa Clara Valley Transportation Authority investment report for March 2026
New policy restricting city property use for federal civil enforcement
City job openings and employee recruitment and retention efforts

saratoga.title: Saratoga City Council — April 15, 2026
saratoga.summary: The city council held a public hearing to address complaints about plans to clean up hazardous conditions on certain properties identified by the county, and voted to move forward with the cleanup work. The council also adopted a new technology policy and approved a process for residents to request accommodations.
keyTopics: Public hearing on hazardous property cleanup and objections from residents
County-identified properties subject to abatement order
New Technology Disruption Policy adopted to replace old policy
Process established for residents to request reasonable accommodations

los-gatos.title: Los Gatos Town Council — May 19, 2026
los-gatos.summary: The Los Gatos Town Council met on May 19, 2026, to approve financial records, accept a donation of emergency medical equipment, and authorize several service contracts and construction projects. The council also reviewed the town's finances for March 2026 and approved a list of projects for the next fiscal year.
keyTopics: Approved financial report and investment activity for March 2026
Accepted donation of Automated External Defibrillator (AED)
Authorized road paving contract with O'Grady Paving
Submitted grant applications for statewide funding
Approved project list for Fiscal Year 2026-2027

san-jose.title: San José City Council — May 20, 2026
san-jose.summary: The San José City Council held a planning meeting to organize upcoming agendas and committee work. They cancelled their May 26 meeting, reviewed the June 2 draft agenda, and updated plans for neighborhood services and open government committees.
keyTopics: Cancelled May 26, 2026 council meeting
June 2, 2026 draft agenda items and scheduling
Updated Neighborhood Services and Education Committee work plan
Rules and Open Government Committee work plan updates
Council-sponsored events approval

mountain-view.title: Mountain View City Council — May 20, 2026
mountain-view.summary: The Mountain View City Council met on May 20, 2026 to approve meeting minutes, hear public comments, and select members for the Youth Advisory Committee for the 2026-27 fiscal year. The council also reviewed upcoming agendas for various city boards and commissions.
keyTopics: Youth Advisory Committee member selection for 2026-27
Public comment period
Review of city board and commission agendas

sunnyvale.title: Sunnyvale City Council — May 19, 2026
sunnyvale.summary: The Sunnyvale City Council held a regular meeting on May 19, 2026, where they recognized Asian Pacific American Heritage Month and Affordable Housing Month. The meeting included standard council procedures and approval of previous meeting minutes.
keyTopics: Recognition of Asian Pacific American Heritage Month
Recognition of Affordable Housing Month
Approval of April meeting minutes

cupertino.title: Cupertino City Council — May 19, 2026
cupertino.summary: The Cupertino City Council met to update the Health and Safety Element of the city's long-term general plan (covering 2015-2040), recognized the Public Works Department for their work during National Public Works Week, and acknowledged Asian American Pacific Islander Month.
keyTopics: Health and Safety Element update to Cupertino's 25-year general plan
Public Works Department recognition (roads, sidewalks, trees, facilities, transportation, sustainability)
Asian American Pacific Islander Month acknowledgment
Some agenda items were postponed

santa-clara.title: Santa Clara City Council — May 20, 2026
santa-clara.summary: Santa Clara is holding Charter Review Committee meetings to discuss potential changes to the city's governing document. Residents can attend in person or join online via Zoom, and can submit written comments by email before the meeting.
keyTopics: Charter Review Committee meetings ongoing
In-person and remote participation options available
Written public comments accepted via email by 10 a.m. the day before meetings

milpitas.title: Milpitas City Council — May 19, 2026
milpitas.summary: The Milpitas City Council held a meeting where they considered new local rules, approved a development project modification, confirmed property assessments, and appointed a permanent City Manager to lead the city.
keyTopics: New urgency ordinance being voted on
Site development permit and map approval for a development project
Property assessment confirmation and ordering
Appointment of permanent City Manager

palo-alto.title: Palo Alto City Council — May 15, 2026
palo-alto.summary: The city council discussed plans to help Palo Alto residents switch from gas to electric heating and appliances in their homes. The council reviewed proposed principles for electrification programs that would help the city comply with air quality regulations set by the regional Air District.
keyTopics: Residential electrification status update and timeline
Proposed principles to guide city electrification assistance programs
Air District regulation compliance requirements
Staff presentation on program implementation
